heading: Wednesday Night
text: A few clouds. Lows in the low to mid 60s, some upper 60s in the broad valleys west. Winds becoming light and variable, except from the southwest 5 to 10 mph in the Champlain and St. Lawrence valleys.

heading: Thursday
text: Mostly to partly sunny. Slight chance of an afternoon shower or thunderstorm south of Route 4, chance to the north, except becoming likely late, near the international border. Highs from the mid 80s to around 90. Southwest winds 5 to 10 mph.

heading: Thursday Night
text: Periods of clouds. Scattered showers and thunderstorms north, and widely scattered south. Lows in the low to mid 60s, some upper 60s in the Champlain Valley. West to northwest winds 5 to 10 mph.
